instruction: Building a rocket step by step (step 6 of 6). So far you've drawn: flame, body, nose-cone, fin-left, fin-right. Add the next part: circle (cx=64, cy=56, r=8, fill #94c8ff, stroke #222, stroke-width 2) with id "window".
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <polygon id="flame" fill="#f97316" points="52,108 64,124 76,108" />
  <rect id="body" fill="#cccccc" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" x="48" y="40" width="32" height="70" />
  <polygon id="nose-cone" fill="#e63946" points="48,40 80,40 64,12" />
  <polygon id="fin-left" fill="#e63946" points="48,80 32,110 48,110" />
  <polygon id="fin-right" fill="#e63946" points="80,80 96,110 80,110" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <polygon id="flame" fill="#f97316" points="52,108 64,124 76,108" />
  <rect id="body" fill="#cccccc" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" x="48" y="40" width="32" height="70" />
  <polygon id="nose-cone" fill="#e63946" points="48,40 80,40 64,12" />
  <polygon id="fin-left" fill="#e63946" points="48,80 32,110 48,110" />
  <polygon id="fin-right" fill="#e63946" points="80,80 96,110 80,110" />
  <circle id="window" fill="#94c8ff" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" cx="64" cy="56" r="8" />
</svg>
